_doc: Agentic Plan Caching (APC) — V12 §6 + arxiv 2506.14852. Index of past Spec Kit outputs (spec.md / design.md / tasks.md) by task fingerprint. Architect checks here BEFORE producing a fresh plan; on hit, reuse + adapt instead of re-planning from scratch. Reuse = -50% cost, -27% latency vs cold plan.
_fingerprint_algorithm: sha256(normalize(mode + ' ' + scope + ' ' + sorted(touched_modules) + ' ' + canonicalized_problem_statement)) — see lib/plan-cache.sh:fingerprint_task
_eviction: LRU over 30 entries OR > 90 days since last_used (whichever first). Architect agent does NOT evict — eviction is a manual Tech Lead concern via lib/plan-cache.sh prune.
_invariants: Each entry MUST point to a STILL-EXISTING team-state/<RUN_ID>/ directory or be evicted.
hits counter only increments on FULL reuse (not partial adaptation).
Adapting an entry = create new entry with parent_run_id reference, do NOT mutate the parent.
